description: Style Note This bag from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion. Product Details Magenta and gold Potli-style purse with embroidered design and a drawstring closure Two short golden straps Silk upper Material and Care Silk Size Length: 16 cm Width: 14 cm
